framework.name: Social Graph Verification
framework.description: Using existing social network connections (e.g., Facebook mutual friends) to create transitive trust. Airbnb allowed filtering listings by hosts who share mutual friends, converting 'stranger' into 'friend-of-friend' and dramatically increasing trust.
framework.raw_quote: airbnb introduced social connections by using data from facebook... i might travel to paris and note that a friend of a friend has a flat there
